document.title: Post-market Surveillance Report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
authorityOrJurisdiction: MFDA Product recall and Suspension of Sale (Korea)
MHRA Alerts and recalls for drugs and medical devices (UK)

sourceSummary.oneLine: PMS report for HAD1717MC/HAD1717MG Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector summarising post-market surveillance data, recalls, complaints, benefit-risk assessment, and PSUR update period.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports MDR post-market surveillance and PSUR documentation for a Class IIa Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
keyPoints: The device is identified as Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, model HAD1717MC/HAD1717MG.
The report cites MDR Article 86 requirements for manufacturers of class IIa, class IIb, and class III devices to prepare a periodic safety update report.
The product risk class is listed as Class IIa and the PSUR update period is once in two years.
FDA, MFDA, and MHRA recall searches reported no recalls for the searched periods.
The report states that complaints and feedback did not significantly affect product performance or safety.
The manufacturer concluded that no information affecting benefit-risk was verified.

evidence.claim: The report is for the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Post-market Surveillance Report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Product name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The covered models are HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
The current revision is Revision No. 4 dated 20 Nov, 2024.
The report was prepared, reviewed, and approved on 20 Nov, 2024.
evidence.evidenceText: Prepared by Yeji Jeong, R&D team 20 Nov, 2024 Reviewed by Jimin, Han R&D team 20 Nov, 2024 Approved by Namkyu, Hur Quality Manager 20 Nov, 2024

evidence.claim: MDR Article 86 is cited as the basis for preparing periodic safety update reports for class IIa, class IIb, and class III devices.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturers of class IIa, class IIb, and class III devices shall prepare a periodic safety update report in accordance with the article 86 of the Regulation (EU) 2017/745 (MDR).

evidence.claim: For devices other than class III or implantable devices, PSURs are made available to the notified body and upon request to competent authorities.
evidence.evidenceText: For devices other than those, manufacturers shall make PSURs available to the notified body involved in the conformity assessment and, upon request, to competent authorities.

evidence.claim: The report states that no previous PMS report existed because this was the first medical device sold to the European market after MDR implementation.
evidence.evidenceText: This is the first medical device to be sold to the European market after MDR was implemented. Therefore, there is no previously generated PMS report.

evidence.claim: The main result of the current PSUR was that benefit-risk was not impacted.
evidence.evidenceText: The main results of the current PSUR PSUR have not impacted the ‘benefit risk’.

evidence.claim: FDA recall searches for X-ray detector reported no recalls for the listed search periods.
evidence.evidenceText: FDA Recall Search Term X-ray detector (MQB) Limits for start and end dates of each search February 23, 2021(Initial CE marking) ~ December 15, 2022 Number of Recall None ... December 16, 2022~ November 20, 2024 Number of Recall None

evidence.claim: MFDA recall and suspension searches reported no recalls for the listed search periods.
evidence.evidenceText: MFDA Product recall and Suspension of Sale (Korea) Search Term 의료영상획득장치 ... Number of Recall None ... December 16, 2022~ November 20, 2024 Number of Recall None

evidence.claim: MHRA alerts and recalls searches reported zero recalls for the listed search periods.
evidence.evidenceText: MHRA Alerts and recalls for drugs and medical devices (UK) Search Term x-ray detector ... Number of Recall 0 ... December 16, 2022~ November 20, 2024 Number of Recall 0

evidence.claim: No non-serious incidents or undesirable side effects with similar products were identified.
evidence.evidenceText: Non-serious accidents with similar products have not been identified. Side effects of similar products have not been identified.
evidence.pageTarget: Non-serious Incidents and Undesirable Side Effects

evidence.claim: Three complaints in 2022 were simple defects caused by customer negligence and did not affect product performance and safety.
evidence.evidenceText: The three complaints that occurred in 2022 were simple defects caused by customer negligence, and there were no issues affecting product performance and safety

evidence.claim: Eighteen customer feedbacks from 2023 to 2024 did not significantly affect performance or safety and were resolved under complaint handling and CAPA procedures.
evidence.evidenceText: Regarding the 18 customer feedbacks that occurred from 2023 to 2024, no incidents that significantly affected performance or safety occurred and were resolved in accordance with the customer complaint handling procedure and corrective and preventive action procedure.

evidence.claim: The risk assessment remained acceptable according to the report.
evidence.evidenceText: The hazard and hazardous situation were correctly identified. The risk was adequately assessed and remains acceptable. Yes Refer to Risk Management Report (Doc No. A-RMR-0-01)

evidence.claim: No preventive or corrective actions were taken.
evidence.evidenceText: Preventive actions taken Rationale of the action N/A Description of the actionN/A Corrective actions taken Rationale of the actionN/A Description of the actionN/A

evidence.claim: The product is classified as Class IIa and its PSUR update period is once every two years.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Model Name HAD1717MC/HAD1717MG Risk Class Class IIa PSUR Update Period Once in two years

reviewFlags.reason: Authority signal metadata indicates FDA, but the document is primarily MDR/European Union PSUR and PMS content while also using FDA, MFDA, and MHRA recall searches.
No explicit document number is present in the extracted source text, although the sourcePath filename includes A-PMSR-002.
Some source text contains formatting or OCR-like artifacts such as joined words and inconsistent acronym spelling, including 'informationThis', 'Description of the actionN/A', and 'PUSR'.
The sales table lists 2023 and 2024 sales while its stated time span is February 23, 2021 to December 15, 2022.
